title: typha minima subsp. lugdunensis
intro: Typha minima subsp. lugdunensis, also known as Dwarf Bulrush or Dwarf Cattail, is a plant species belonging to the cattail family (Typhaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Typha minima subsp. lugdunensis is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing swelling, and supporting respiratory health, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Typha minima subsp. lugdunensis include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
